name: natural-prompt-pair-cases
description: Prompt-pair sheet for testing whether natural human questions reach the same document intent as clear, ideal prompts.

cases.perfect_prompt: Which document was uploaded most recently? Return the exact file name and a one sentence description if content is available.
Summarize the most recently uploaded document. Mention the file name and the main topic in a concise answer.
In the document named "{document_name}", what is it mainly about? Include concrete details from the document.
Read "{document_name}" and extract the most important dates, numbers, people, organizations, or codes you can find. Keep it concise.
cases.human_prompt: anything important i should notice in {short_name}?

cases.perfect_prompt: Find documents related to "{topic}" and explain briefly what the relevant document says.
Find documents that are most similar to "{document_name}". Explain why they are similar.
Compare "{document_name}" with "{other_document_name}". Tell me what is similar and what is different.
cases.human_prompt: are {short_name} and {other_short_name} basically the same or different?

cases.perfect_prompt: List the uploaded documents by type and mention which ones look most useful for business questions.
cases.human_prompt: what kinda files have i uploaded?

cases.perfect_prompt: Prepare a business-friendly summary of "{document_name}" with purpose, key facts, and possible follow-up questions.
cases.human_prompt: can you give me the useful business summary of {short_name}?

cases.perfect_prompt: First identify "{document_name}", then explain what that document is about.
cases.human_prompt: and what was that one about?
